description.en-US: A short consultation on the moral and theological status of casting lots — for decision-making, divination, and gambling — addressed to a James of Tonengo.
description.la: Responsum breve de statu morali et theologico iactus sortium — ad decisiones, divinationem, et aleam — ad Iacobum de Tonengo compositum.

sources.description: English translation revised by the Aquinas Institute. Mirrored from aquinas.cc.
Latin text from the Leonine / Marietti editions (public domain), mirrored from aquinas.cc.

title.en-US: Chapter 1 — The matters into which a search for information by lots can be made
Chapter 2 — The end to which lots are ordered
Chapter 3 — The manner of seeking information through lots
Chapter 4 — Whence lots derive their power
Chapter 5 — Whether it is permitted to use lots
